title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nocil South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nocil South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nocil South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nocil South Asia Partners:
Nocil South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
